description: Fix CQC Compliance page data mapping issues: (1) Inspection Prep tab shows empty checkboxes because frontend renders item.label but backend stores item.title/description; (2) CQC Readiness tab data mapping issues with backend response wrapping; (3) Add comprehensive CQC compliance demo data and predictive risk data to seed-demo.ts
steps: Fix frontend/src/pages/Compliance.tsx InspectionPrepTab: The backend controller (cqcCompliance.controller.ts) stores checklist items as {title, description, completed} but the frontend renders {item.label}. Change the rendering in InspectionPrepTab to use item.title instead of item.label, and display item.description below the title. Also add a domain badge showing which CQC domain each checklist belongs to.

Fix frontend/src/types/index.ts: Update the InspectionChecklist interface items array type from { label: string; completed: boolean; evidence?: string } to { title: string; description: string; completed: boolean; evidence?: string } to match backend data.

Fix the data unwrapping in the CQC hooks. The backend getDomainScores returns { scores: [...] } but useCqcDomainScores returns r.data directly which would be { scores: [...] }. The CqcReadinessTab does 'const { data: scores = [] }' and checks Array.isArray(scores) which would be false. Fix the hook to unwrap: complianceApi.getCqcScores().then(r => r.data.scores || r.data). Similarly fix useCqcEvidencePacks (backend returns { packs: [...] }), usePolicyReviews (backend returns { policies: [...] }). Also fix useComplianceOverview - backend returns {domainScores, overduePolicies, expiringTraining, openComplianceActions, overallReadiness} but the frontend ComplianceOverview type expects {domain_scores, overdue_policies_count, expiring_training_count, open_actions_count, overall_readiness_score}. Fix the hook to transform the response to match the frontend type.

Add comprehensive CQC compliance demo data to backend/src/utils/seed-demo.ts BEFORE the COMMIT statement. Add: (a) cqc_domain_scores - all 5 domains (safe, effective, caring, responsive, well_led) with realistic scores for past 30 days (one per day per domain); (b) cqc_evidence_packs - 4 sample evidence packs with varying statuses and domain combinations; (c) policy_reviews - 10+ policy review records linked to existing policies, some with overdue next_review_date; (d) inspection_prep_checklists - one for each of the 5 domains with 8 items each containing proper titles and descriptions (use the DEFAULT_CHECKLIST_ITEMS from the controller as a reference - items like 'Risk assessments up to date', 'Staff training compliance >90%', 'Medication administration records complete', etc.), some items marked completed.

Add predictive_risk_scores and predictive_alerts data to seed-demo.ts. For predictive_risk_scores: generate falls and deterioration risk scores for all high-risk residents (rooms 2, 4, 8, 10, 14, 20, 24) over the past 30 days (one falls + one deterioration score every 3-5 days per resident). For predictive_alerts: generate 5-8 active alerts for high-risk residents with realistic risk_scores (70-95), factors JSON, and varied alert_types (falls_risk, deterioration_risk, weight_loss_risk, medication_interaction).

Ensure the Compliance.tsx CQC Readiness tab properly displays data. The overview endpoint response keys are camelCase (overallReadiness, overduePolicies, expiringTraining, openComplianceActions) but the frontend references overview?.overall_readiness_score etc. Either fix the backend response to use snake_case keys OR fix the frontend to reference the correct camelCase keys. Choose the simpler approach of fixing the frontend references to match what the backend actually sends.
acceptance_criteria: Running 'cd frontend && npm run build' completes without errors
Running 'cd backend && npm run build' completes without errors
InspectionPrepTab renders item.title (not item.label) for checklist items with item.description shown below
The InspectionChecklist type in types/index.ts uses title/description fields instead of label
seed-demo.ts contains comprehensive CQC data: domain scores for all 5 domains, evidence packs, policy reviews, and inspection checklists with proper titles/descriptions
seed-demo.ts contains predictive_risk_scores data for high-risk residents and predictive_alerts data
The hooks properly unwrap API responses (scores from {scores:[...]}, packs from {packs:[...]}, policies from {policies:[...]})
CQC Readiness tab overview data references match the backend response key naming
